summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All features working correctly: Dashboard stats aggregation from phishing_campaigns and ad_campaigns, Ad Simulations page loads campaigns/templates without errors, Copy URL button generates clean URL format, Ad tracking URL at root level works correctly, and favicon displays correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats endpoint (server.py:1575-1607) correctly aggregates from phishing_campaigns and ad_campaigns collections
Ad tracking URL uses /api/track/{campaign_id} on backend which is correctly called by AdTracker.js via API
AdTrackerWrapper (App.js:281-293) correctly routes campaign IDs (adcamp_ and adcmp_ prefixes) to AdTracker page
Favicon.svg exists and is referenced in index.html line 12
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 1 ad campaign (adcmp_test_b3d7bdf0), 6 ad templates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration verified working. Campaign ID prefixes supported: adcamp_ and adcmp_ (legacy). Ad tracking URL without user param shows 'requires user parameter' message. Rate limiter on login is 5 requests/minute.

dashboard_stats_aggregation.details: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns aggregated counts from phishing_campaigns + ad_campaigns collections. Fields: total_campaigns, active_campaigns correctly sum both campaign types.

ad_simulations_page.details: Ad Simulations page (/ads) loads without errors. Campaigns tab shows existing campaign with stats. Templates tab shows 6 templates. Both tabs functional with proper data-testid attributes.

copy_url_button.details: Copy URL button generates clean URL format: {domain}/{campaign_id}. Visual feedback: button changes to green checkmark with 'Copied!' text. Toast notification shows 'Tracking URL copied to clipboard'.

ad_tracking_root_url.details: URL /{campaign_id} correctly routes to AdTracker page via AdTrackerWrapper. Without ?u= param, shows 'This tracking link requires a valid user parameter' message. Both adcamp_ and adcmp_ prefixes work.

favicon_flash_fix.details: favicon.svg exists in /app/frontend/public/ and is referenced in index.html. SVG favicon with VasilisNetShield shield design in gold/dark theme colors.
